questionHtml: State an assumption that the company is making, in order to use a t-test.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

The decreases in cholesterol are distributed normally    A1

OR

The variance of the two groups of volunteers is equal.    A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: State an assumption that the company is making, in order to use a t-test.
